search.query: not level :Normal  | select Time, "reason", "总数" from (select time_series(__time__, '1h', '%m-%d %H', '0') as Time , reason as reason, count(1) as "总数" from log group by Time, reason  order by Time asc )  HAVING reason is not null and  reason in (select reason from log where reason != 'Normal' group by reason order by count(1) desc limit 10) limit 10000
search.tokenQuery: * | select Time, Level, "总数" from (select time_series(__time__, '1h', '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%S', '0') as Time , level as Level, count(1) as "总数" from log group by Time, Level   order by Time asc ) having Level is not null limit 10000

search.query: * | select ns from ( select "eventId.reason" as ns, count(1) as total from log group by ns having ns is not null  order by total desc  limit 100 )

eventId.reason : OOMKilling |  SELECT cast(diff[1] as bigint) as today, cast((diff[1] - diff[2]) as bigint) as lastday, hostname, kind, namespace, name, message from ( SELECT compare(total, 86400) as  diff, arbitrary(hostname) as hostname, arbitrary(kind) as kind, arbitrary(namespace) as namespace, arbitrary(name) as name, arbitrary(message) as message from (SELECT COUNT(*) as total, max_by("object-kind", __time__) as kind, max_by("object-namespace", __time__) as namespace, max_by("object-name", __time__) as name, max_by("message", __time__) as message, max_by("hostname", __time__) as hostname  from log) )
search.tokenQuery: eventId.reason : NodeControllerEviction |  SELECT cast (diff[1] as bigint) as today, round(100.0 * (diff[1] - diff[2]) / diff[2], 2) as delta from ( SELECT compare(total, 86400) as  diff from (SELECT COUNT(*) as total from log) )

search.query: eventId.reason : PIDPressure or eventId.reason : NodeHasPIDPressure  |  SELECT cast(diff[1] as bigint) as today, cast((diff[1] - diff[2]) as bigint) as lastday, hostname, kind, namespace, name, message, reason from ( SELECT compare(total, 86400) as diff, arbitrary(hostname) as hostname, arbitrary(kind) as kind, arbitrary(namespace) as namespace, arbitrary(name) as name, arbitrary(message) as message, arbitrary(reason) as reason from (SELECT COUNT(*) as total, max_by("object-kind", __time__) as kind, max_by("object-namespace", __time__) as namespace, max_by("object-name", __time__) as name, max_by("message", __time__) as message, max_by("hostname", __time__) as hostname, max_by("eventId.reason", __time__) as reason from log) )
search.tokenQuery: eventId.reason : NodeControllerEviction |  SELECT cast (diff[1] as bigint) as today, round(100.0 * (diff[1] - diff[2]) / diff[2], 2) as delta from ( SELECT compare(total, 86400) as  diff from (SELECT COUNT(*) as total from log) )

search.query: eventId.message : "PLEG is not healthy" |  SELECT cast(diff[1] as bigint) as today, cast((diff[1] - diff[2]) as bigint) as lastday, hostname, kind, namespace, name, message, reason from ( SELECT compare(total, 86400) as diff, arbitrary(hostname) as hostname, arbitrary(kind) as kind, arbitrary(namespace) as namespace, arbitrary(name) as name, arbitrary(message) as message, arbitrary(reason) as reason from (SELECT COUNT(*) as total, max_by("object-kind", __time__) as kind, max_by("object-namespace", __time__) as namespace, max_by("object-name", __time__) as name, max_by("message", __time__) as message, max_by("hostname", __time__) as hostname, max_by("eventId.reason", __time__) as reason from log) )
search.tokenQuery: eventId.reason : NodeControllerEviction |  SELECT cast (diff[1] as bigint) as today, round(100.0 * (diff[1] - diff[2]) / diff[2], 2) as delta from ( SELECT compare(total, 86400) as  diff from (SELECT COUNT(*) as total from log) )

search.query: eventId.message : "PLEG is not healthy"  | select date_format(__time__, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%S') as time,  component as "事件源", "object-kind" as "事件目标", reason as "类型",  "object-name" as "目标名", "hostname" as "Host",  message as "详细内容" from log order by time desc limit 100
search.tokenQuery: eventId.involvedObject.name : ${ObjectName} and eventId.involvedObject.namespace : ${ObjectNamespace} and eventId.involvedObject.kind : ${ObjectKind} | select date_format(__time__, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%S') as time,level as "等级", reason as "类型",  message as "详细内容" from log order by time desc limit 100

search.query: eventId.reason : SpotToBeReleased |  SELECT cast(diff[1] as bigint) as today, cast((diff[1] - diff[2]) as bigint) as lastday, hostname, kind, namespace, name, message, reason from ( SELECT compare(total, 86400) as diff, arbitrary(hostname) as hostname, arbitrary(kind) as kind, arbitrary(namespace) as namespace, arbitrary(name) as name, arbitrary(message) as message, arbitrary(reason) as reason from (SELECT COUNT(*) as total, max_by("object-kind", __time__) as kind, max_by("object-namespace", __time__) as namespace, max_by("object-name", __time__) as name, max_by("message", __time__) as message, max_by("hostname", __time__) as hostname, max_by("eventId.reason", __time__) as reason from log) )
search.tokenQuery: eventId.reason : NodeControllerEviction |  SELECT cast (diff[1] as bigint) as today, round(100.0 * (diff[1] - diff[2]) / diff[2], 2) as delta from ( SELECT compare(total, 86400) as  diff from (SELECT COUNT(*) as total from log) )
